blended.narrative: Bretton Woods is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.3 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 328 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.9" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
